$comment: Allowlist of intentional sync-over-async (.GetAwaiter().GetResult()) call-sites. Category A = host requires synchronous entry-point; Category B = avoidable (never listed here). Entries are identified semantically by file + pattern + method, NOT by line number — line numbers drift and the linter reports the accurate current line at scan time. Review entries when they expire; if the host constraint still exists, renew the date.

entries.reason: IDisposable.Dispose() is inherently synchronous. DownloadClientBase lifecycle requires sync disposal; async cleanup delegated to DisposeAsync().
One-shot startup migration of legacy plaintext session to protected envelope. Runs from sync init path before any async context exists; making the migrator async cascades to plugin construction.

Wrapped in lock(_persistLock) to serialize file I/O against concurrent persist/clear. Mixing lock {} with await is a well-known deadlock vector; switching to SemaphoreSlim cascades async to every authentication call-site (IIndexer.Test, IDownloadClient.Test) which Lidarr invokes synchronously.
